LOGIN.TERMS_TEXT: By logging in you agree to

STEP1.TITLE: Welcome to MyTradingBox
STEP1.INTRO: This short tour explains the key features so you can get started right away.
STEP1.CHART: Chart – live candlestick chart with key zones & indicators
STEP1.TIMEFRAME: Timeframe – easily switch between 12m, 1H, 4H, 1D and more
STEP1.EXCHANGE: Exchange – choose which exchange you trade on
STEP1.COIN_INFO: Coin info – view details & add a coin to your watchlist
STEP1.WATCHLIST: Watchlist – track your favorite coins at a glance
STEP1.TIP: Use the arrows below to step through the tour, or close with ×.

STEP2.TITLE: Choose Exchange & Coin
STEP2.EXCHANGE_DESC: Exchange — select the desired exchange at the top of the chart screen (e.g. Bybit). All coins and prices load automatically for that exchange.
STEP2.SYMBOL_DESC: Coin (Symbol) — choose a coin via the dropdown next to the exchange. Type the name to search quickly. Your choice is saved automatically.
STEP2.ITEM1: Only coins with active box analysis are shown in the list
STEP2.ITEM2: BTCUSDT, Dominance etc. are always available
STEP2.ITEM3: Exchanges and coins are never removed
STEP2.TIP: 💡 Tip: you can also navigate to a coin directly from the Watchlist.

STEP3.TITLE: Chart & Timeframe
STEP3.INTRO: The chart shows live candlesticks for the selected coin and timeframe.
STEP3.TIMEFRAME_SWITCH: Switch timeframe — use the buttons above the chart:
STEP3.NAV_ZOOM: Pinch or scroll to zoom in and out
STEP3.NAV_DOUBLE: Double-tap to return to the current candle

STEP4.TITLE: Chart Settings
STEP4.INTRO: The gear icon (⚙) at the top right of the chart opens settings. Toggle layers on or off:
STEP4.BOXES: Boxes – support & resistance zones (on by default)
STEP4.KEYZONES: Key Zones – critical price levels based on historical data
STEP4.INDICATORS: Indicators – EMAs, golden/silver signals and divergences
STEP4.ORDERS: Orders – show open orders as lines on the chart
STEP4.DRAWING_TOOLS: Drawing tools — at the bottom left of the chart are buttons to draw lines, rectangles and labels. Use the eraser to delete them.

STEP5.TITLE: Watchlist
STEP5.INTRO: The Watchlist is your personal overview of coins you want to follow. Open it via the menu at the bottom.
STEP5.OVERVIEW: For each coin you can see at a glance:
STEP5.ITEM2: Candle direction for 1H, 4H and 1D — green (▲), red (▼) or neutral
STEP5.NAVIGATE: To the chart — tap a coin or a candle indicator to navigate directly to that timeframe chart.
STEP5.TIP: 💡 BTCUSDT and Dominance are always at the top and cannot be removed.

STEP6.TITLE: Coin Info & Watchlist Management
STEP6.COIN_INFO_DESC: Coin info — tap the coin name in the Watchlist to open the detail page. You'll see:
STEP6.ADD_DESC: Add to Watchlist — go to Watchlist → + Add, search for a coin and confirm. The coin appears immediately in your overview.
STEP6.REMOVE_DESC: Remove from Watchlist — swipe the row to the left or use the remove button on the coin's detail page.
STEP6.TIP: 💡 Fixed coins (BTC, Dominance) cannot be removed.

STEP7.TITLE: You're all set! 🚀
STEP7.INTRO: You now know all the basics of MyTradingBox. A quick summary:
STEP7.ITEM1: Exchange & Coin — choose at the top of the chart
STEP7.ITEM3: Chart settings — toggle layers via the gear icon
STEP7.ITEM4: Watchlist — track coins, candle directions at a glance
STEP7.ITEM5: Coin info — tap a coin for details & watchlist management
STEP7.PUSH_NOTE: Push notifications for gold & silver signals take you automatically to the right chart when you tap the notification — as long as you're logged in.
STEP7.GOODBYE: Good luck and keep a sharp eye on the market! 💪

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.SECURITY_VALUE: Never share API keys or passwords. We will never ask for your seed phrase.
